style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram of a gate sitting at the boundary between a workshop area on the left and a delivery area on the right. The gate is closed; a small lock and a tag reading STOP HOOK hang from it. On the workshop side, a labelled agent box stands ready. On the delivery side, a clean document waits to be released. Hand-drawn lines, navy and rust on warm cream paper. No people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram of a gate sitting at the boundary between a workshop area on the left and a delivery area on the right. The gate is closed; a small lock and a tag reading STOP HOOK hang from it. On the workshop side, a labelled agent box stands ready. On the delivery side, a clean document waits to be released. Hand-drawn lines, navy and rust on warm cream paper. No people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
